intro:
The central problem with dating apps in 2026: fake profiles, bots, and scams erode trust. Profile verification is the solution — but most apps make it optional or hide it behind a subscription.

On Embir, selfie verification is available at signup for all users. the reporting workflow records every report.

comparisonTable.embir: reporting workflow + reports recorded for review

sections.title: Why verification changes the experience
sections.content: A verified profile means the person completed an approved selfie check. It doesn't eliminate all bad behavior, but it creates significant friction for fake accounts and bots. On Embir, verified profiles are prioritized in discovery. You see people who made the effort to verify first.
highlights: Selfie verification = significant barrier to bots
reporting and blocking = fast action on reports

verdict: If verified profiles are your priority in a dating app, Embir is the best choice in 2026: free selfie verification for all, reporting and blocking tools, and verified profiles prioritized in discovery.
ctaText: Verified profiles, real people — join Embir

faq.a: Selfie verification at signup: you take a photo in a specific pose that adds a visible badge after approval. Reports are recorded for review, and blocking is immediate.
Yes. Selfie verification is free and available to all users.
Yes. Verified profiles have priority in the discovery algorithm.
